overall.description: A static nighttime view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic city skyline across a dark body of water. The scene features illuminated skyscrapers under an overcast sky with gentle waves lapping at a concrete waterfront barrier, creating a moody, atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic.

agents.ego_description: standing still at the waterfront observing the illuminated city skyline across the water

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings with various colored lights piercing through the atmospheric haze
dark water with white foamy waves gently lapping against the shore in the foreground
low concrete barrier separating the viewing position from the water's edge
illuminated corporate signage with teal-green lettering mounted on a building facade

segments.scene_description: A stationary view from a waterfront promenade looking out across dark water toward a sprawling futuristic cityscape. The skyline features numerous illuminated towers piercing through a hazy overcast night sky, with gentle waves visible in the foreground and a corporate neon sign glowing on the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze from a dark waterfront toward a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic skyline. It begins with a stationary view from a promenade, looking across the dark expanse of water where gentle waves lap against the shore. As the eye settles on the horizon, the scene emphasizes the contrast between the deep shadows of the foreground and the numerous illuminated towers piercing a hazy, overcast night sky. The perspective remains fixed, allowing the glow of a corporate neon sign on the right to anchor the frame against the distant, shimmering cityscape.
